response.justification: Bogdan is an accomplished full-stack engineer with strong software craftsmanship and 20 years of experience, but is fundamentally misaligned with this role's core requirements. The position explicitly requires a C++ systems programmer with 8–12 years of hands-on industrial automation experience. Bogdan's C++ experience is limited to 6 months in 2014–2015; his recent decade has focused on web technologies (TypeScript, Node.js, React). He has no demonstrated background in industrial automation, IoT protocols (MQTT, Modbus, IEC 61850), or security standards (IEC 62443). While his software engineering practices are commendable, the technical foundation and domain knowledge required are substantially absent.
strengths: 20+ years of software development with recent senior-level roles demonstrating strong software craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD, testing)
Proven ability to architect and scale systems handling millions of concurrent requests and complex distributed infrastructure
Demonstrated mentorship and community engagement through workshops, open-source contributions, and team training
concerns: C++ experience limited to 6 months in 2014–2015 with no recent practice; primary expertise is web technologies (TypeScript, JavaScript, Node.js)
No background in industrial automation, embedded systems, IoT protocols, or industrial control systems
No evidence of IEC 62443, Secure Development Lifecycle implementation, or industrial cybersecurity standards knowledge
